ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region in which the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone(s) of the country */,
  "healthcare_system_rating" REAL /* Rating of the healthcare system (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries reported */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "change" INTEGER /* Change in cases from the previous day */,
  "vaccinated_population" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinated individuals in the country */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Number of tests conducted per 1000 people */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Number of hospitalizations per 1000 confirmed cases */,
  "icu_usage_rate" REAL /* Number of ICU beds used per 1000 confirmed cases */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of cases (e.g., JSON format) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "healthcare_spending" INTEGER /* Annual healthcare spending in the region */,
  "healthcare_quality_index" REAL /* Index of healthcare quality in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the health agency */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the health agency */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the agency was established */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the agency */,
  "annual_budget" INTEGER /* Annual budget of the agency */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the agency (e.g., public health, epidemiology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_agencies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "reliability_rating" REAL /* Reliability rating of the data source (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  "data_latency" INTEGER /* Average latency in data reporting (in hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_details" TEXT /* Details of what was updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID or name who made the update */,
  "reason_for_update" TEXT /* Reason for the update (e.g., correction, new data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the recipient */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, failed) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., 1 for high, 3 for low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or details regarding the check */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* User ID or name who performed the check */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issues found (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken after the check (e.g., corrected, reported) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the import */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the imported data */,
  "imported_by" TEXT /* User ID or name who initiated the import */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "import_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the import process in seconds */,
  "import_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
